}; const PACK_SIZES = { x5: { cantidad: 5, precio: "3.000", link: "https://mpago.la/32xq2kN" }, x8: { cantidad: 8, precio: "5.000", link: "https://mpago.la/33iDiF2" }, x12: { cantidad: 12, precio: "8.000", link: "https://mpago.la/2DzSyJ9" }, }; const VOLUNTARIADOS = [ { nombre: "Cocineros Soplo 👩🏼‍🍳🧑🏽‍🍳", link: "https://chat.whatsapp.com/IAr1T5ssSkkENSQ2Xd3KU2?s=sw&p=i&ilr=1", descripcion: "Si te gustaría cocinarles las viandas a nuestros soplitos, este grupo es para vos. No hace falta saber cocinar, solo pedimos algunas carnes y verduras hervidas." }, { nombre: "🚘 Traslados Soplo 🚘", link: "https://chat.whatsapp.com/GqrRqdK6VxJJaeHFErs8Dh?s=sw&p=i&ilr=1", descripcion: "Si tenés movilidad propia o podés ayudarnos con traslados pidiendo un auto o una moto de envíos, este grupo es para vos. Actualizamos cada día los traslados que necesitamos." }, { nombre: "🏘️ Tránsitos Soplo 1 🏘️", link: "https://chat.whatsapp.com/BKDvVDa5fAs5i7CYFQc6tL?s=sw&p=i&ilr=1", descripcion: "¿Querés ser hogar de tránsito? Cada día tenemos nuevos rescatados y el hogar de tránsito suele ser el primer lugar donde duermen calentitos, protegidos y con amor." }, { nombre: "🐶 Tránsitos Soplo 2 🐶", link: "https://chat.whatsapp.com/E7f2Tyb3lyv7Yoo9J92fIL?s=sw&p=i&ilr=1", descripcion: "¿Querés ser hogar de tránsito? Ellos necesitan un lugar donde recuperarse y tener sus cuidados hasta que puedan ser adoptados. Si querés ser parte de ese hermoso cambio, sumate." }, { nombre: "🐶 Tránsitos Soplo 3 🐶", link: "https://chat.whatsapp.com/DS7IYcM5SonBss2jlA9yC7?s=sw&p=i&ilr=1", descripcion: "¿Querés ser hogar de tránsito? El tránsito es una de las partes más importantes del rescate. Sumate a esta red de amor y cuidado." }, { nombre: "📸 Fotógrafxs Soplo 📸", link: "https://chat.whatsapp.com/Fo34vrIayJT66SJp6h2DYk?s=sw&p=i&ilr=1", descripcion: "Si tenés cámara de fotos y amás a los animalitos, este grupo es para vos. Todos nuestros soplitos necesitan una buena sesión de fotos para poder subirlos a nuestras redes." }, ]; const gs = ` @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Pacifico&display=swap'); *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0} body{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;background:#F3EEFF;color:#3D2B5A} ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#E8DFFA}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#C9B8E8;border-radius:10px} .app{min-height:100vh;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#EBF6FD 0%,#F3EEFF 50%,#E8DFFA 100%)} /* AUTH */ .auth-wrap{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#D6EEFA,#E8DFFA 60%,#C9B8E8)} .auth-logo{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:2.4rem;color:#7B5EA7;text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(123,94,167,.15);margin-bottom:4px} .auth-sub{color:#9B80C0;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:32px;text-align:center} .auth-card{background:#fff;border-radius:24px;padding:32px 28px;width:100%;max-width:380px;box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(123,94,167,.15)} .auth-title{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:800;color:#3D2B5A;margin-bottom:6px} .auth-toggle{font-size:.88rem;color:#9B80C0;margin-bottom:24px} .auth-toggle span{color:#7B5EA7;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline} .igrp{margin-bottom:16px} .ilbl{display:block;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;color:#6B4F8A;margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:.03em;text-transform:uppercase} .ifld{width:100%;padding:12px 16px;border:2px solid #E8DFFA;border-radius:12px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:.95rem;color:#3D2B5A;background:#F9F5FF;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s} .ifld:focus{border-color:#C9B8E8;background:#fff} .btn-pri{width:100%;padding:14px;border:none;border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C9B8E8,#A78FD0);color:#fff;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(167,143,208,.4)} .btn-pri:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(167,143,208,.5)} .err{background:#FFE8E8;color:#C0392B;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:16px} /* LAYOUT */ .hdr{background:#fff;padding:16px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(123,94,167,.08);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100} .hdr-logo{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:1.4rem;color:#7B5EA7} .hdr-usr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px} .avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C9B8E8,#B3D9F2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;color:#7B5EA7} .uname{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:#6B4F8A} .btn-out{background:none;border:2px solid #E8DFFA;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 12px;color:#9B80C0;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s} .btn-out:hover{background:#F3EEFF;color:#7B5EA7;border-color:#C9B8E8} .nav{background:#fff;border-top:2px solid #E8DFFA;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;display:flex;z-index:100} .nitem{flex:1;padding:10px 4px 8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;transition:background .15s} .nitem.active{background:#F3EEFF} .nico{font-size:1.3rem} .nlbl{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;color:#9B80C0;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.03em} .nitem.active .nlbl{color:#7B5EA7} .main{padding:20px 16px 90px;max-width:640px;margin:0 auto} /* ALBUM */ .sec-title{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:1.6rem;color:#7B5EA7;margin-bottom:6px} .sec-sub{font-size:.88rem;color:#9B80C0;margin-bottom:24px} .prog-wrap{background:#E8DFFA;border-radius:20px;height:10px;margin-bottom:24px;overflow:hidden} .prog-fill{height:100%;border-radius:20px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#B3D9F2,#C9B8E8,#A78FD0);transition:width .6s ease} .prog-lbl{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;color:#6B4F8A;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between} .cat-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin:28px 0 14px} .cat-badge{padding:5px 14px;border-radius:20px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em} .cat-badge.soplitos{background:#E8DFFA;color:#7B5EA7} .cat-badge.soplitos_pro{background:#FFF3B0;color:#9A7200} .cat-badge.angelitos{background:#E8EDF7;color:#5A6A8A} .cat-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:#E8DFFA} .fig-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px} @media(min-width:480px){.fig-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}} .fig{border-radius:16px;padding:12px 8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;text-align:center;position:relative;transition:transform .15s;cursor:default} .fig.owned{box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(167,143,208,.18)} .fig.not-owned{filter:grayscale(1) opacity(.5)} .fig.soplitos.owned{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#F3EEFF,#E8DFFA);border:2px solid #D5C8F0} .fig.soplitos.not-owned{background:#E8E8E8;border:2px solid #D0D0D0} .fig.soplitos_pro.owned{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#FFFBE6,#FFF3B0);border:2px solid #F5C842;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(245,200,66,.3)} .fig.soplitos_pro.not-owned{background:#E8E8E8;border:2px solid #D0D0D0} .fig.angelitos.owned{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#F0F3F8,#E2E8F4);border:2px solid #C0C8D8} .fig.angelitos.not-owned{background:#E8E8E8;border:2px solid #D0D0D0} .fig-num{position:absolute;top:6px;left:8px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:800;color:#9B80C0} .fig-emoji{font-size:1.8rem;line-height:1} .fig-name{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:800;color:#3D2B5A;line-height:1.2} .fig-det{font-size:.62rem;color:#6B4F8A;line-height:1.4} .fig-est{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:700;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:2px} .fig-est.adopcion{background:#D4F4E4;color:#1A6940} .fig-est.refugio{background:#D6EEFA;color:#1A4A6A} .fig-est.adoptado{background:#EDE4F8;color:#5B3A8A} .fig-est.angelito{background:#E8EDF7;color:#3A4A6A} .fig-pareja{font-size:.55rem;color:#7B5EA7;font-weight:700;background:#EDE4F8;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 5px} .ig-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F3EEFF,#EBF6FD);border:2px solid #D5C8F0;border-radius:16px;padding:14px 16px;margin-top:12px;font-size:.82rem;color:#6B4F8A} .ig-card a{color:#7B5EA7;font-weight:700} /* TIENDA */ .pack-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(155px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-bottom:28px} .pack-card{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(167,143,208,.13);border:2px solid #E8DFFA;transition:transform .15s} .pack-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)} .pack-emoji{font-size:2.4rem;margin-bottom:8px} .pack-name{font-weight:800;font-size:1.1rem;color:#3D2B5A} .pack-price{color:#7B5EA7;font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;margin:4px 0 12px} .btn-pack{display:block;width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C9B8E8,#A78FD0);color:#fff;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:800;text-decoration:none;text-align:center;transition:opacity .15s} .btn-pack:hover{opacity:.88} .info-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F3EEFF,#EBF6FD);border-radius:16px;padding:16px 18px;border:2px solid #D6EEFA;margin-bottom:16px} .info-card .ititle{font-weight:800;font-size:.95rem;color:#3D2B5A;margin-bottom:6px} .info-card p{font-size:.85rem;color:#6B4F8A;line-height:1.6} .info-card a{color:#7B5EA7;font-weight:700} .don-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E8DFFA,#D6EEFA);border-radius:20px;padding:20px 18px} .don-title{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:1.3rem;color:#7B5EA7;margin-bottom:8px} .don-list{list-style:none;margin:12px 0} .don-list li{font-size:.85rem;color:#6B4F8A;padding:4px 0 4px 20px;position:relative} .don-list li::before{content:"🐾";position:absolute;left:0;font-size:.75rem} /* CAMBIOS */ .cambio-form{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:20px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(167,143,208,.1);margin-bottom:20px} .cambio-form select{width:100%;padding:10px 14px;border:2px solid #E8DFFA;border-radius:12px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;color:#3D2B5A;background:#F9F5FF;outline:none;margin-bottom:12px} .cambio-form select:focus{border-color:#C9B8E8} .cambio-card{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(167,143,208,.1);border:2px solid #E8DFFA;margin-bottom:12px} .cambio-user{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:#9B80C0;margin-bottom:6px} .cambio-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.88rem;color:#3D2B5A;font-weight:700;flex-wrap:wrap} .cambio-arrow{color:#C9B8E8;font-size:1.2rem} .btn-acc{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#B3D9F2,#C9B8E8);border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:8px 16px;color:#fff;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;margin-top:10px} .empty{text-align:center;padding:40px 20px;color:#9B80C0} .empty .eemoji{font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:12px} .empty p{font-size:.9rem} /* RANKING */ .rank-card{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:16px 18px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(167,143,208,.08)} .rpos{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:900;color:#C9B8E8;width:32px;text-align:center} .rpos.gold{color:#F5C842}.rpos.silver{color:#A0AABC}.rpos.bronze{color:#D4956A} .rinfo{flex:1} .rname{font-weight:800;color:#3D2B5A;font-size:.95rem} .rpct{font-size:.78rem;color:#9B80C0} .rbar-w{width:80px;height:6px;background:#E8DFFA;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden} .rbar-f{height:100%;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#B3D9F2,#A78FD0)} /* COMUNIDAD */ .vol-card{background:#fff;border-radius:18px;padding:18px;margin-bottom:12px;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(167,143,208,.09);border:2px solid #E8DFFA} .vol-name{font-weight:800;color:#3D2B5A;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:6px} .vol-desc{font-size:.83rem;color:#6B4F8A;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:12px} .btn-wa{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:#25D366;color:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:9px 16px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:800;text-decoration:none;transition:opacity .15s} .btn-wa:hover{opacity:.88} .toast{position:fixed;top:80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#3D2B5A;color:#fff;padding:12px 24px;border-radius:14px;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;z-index:999;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(61,43,90,.3);animation:fio 2.8s forwards} @keyframes fio{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-10px)}10%{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}80%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:0}} `; const estadoClass = (e) => ({ "En adopción":"adopcion","En el refugio":"refugio","Adoptado":"adoptado","Adoptada":"adoptado","Adoptados":"adoptado","Angelito":"angelito" }[e] || "refugio"); // figEmoji replaced by photo const getPct = (owned, total) => Math.round((owned / total) * 100); // ── AUTH ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function AuthScreen({ onLogin }) { const [mode, setMode] = useState("login"); const [form, setForm] = useState({ username: "", password: "" }); const [err, setErr] = useState(""); const [users, setUsers] = useState({}); useEffect(() => { try { const r = localStorage.getItem("sdv_users"); if (r) setUsers(JSON.parse(r)); } catch {} }, []); const handle = async () => { setErr(""); const { username, password } = form; if (!username.trim() || !password.trim()) { setErr("Completá todos los campos."); return; } if (mode === "register") { if (users[username]) { setErr(`El nombre "${username}" ya está en uso. Agregale un número o usá otro nombre.`); return; } const u = { username, password, album: [], cambios: [] }; const nu = { ...users, [username]: u }; localStorage.setItem("sdv_users", JSON.stringify(nu)); localStorage.setItem("sdv_session", username); onLogin(username, nu); } else { if (!users[username] || users[username].password !== password) { setErr("Usuario o contraseña incorrectos."); return; } localStorage.setItem("sdv_session", username); onLogin(username, users); } }; return ( <>
🐾 Soplo de Vida

}
setForm({ ...form, username: e.target.value })} onKeyDown={e => e.key === "Enter" && handle()} />
setForm({ ...form, password: e.target.value })} onKeyDown={e => e.key === "Enter" && handle()} />
); } // ── ALBUM ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function AlbumSection({ userData }) { const owned = new Set(userData?.album || []); const total = FIGURITAS_DATA.length; const pct = getPct(owned.size, total); const [filtro, setFiltro] = useState("todas"); // todas | tengo | me-faltan const cats = [ { key: "soplitos", label: "Soplitos" }, { key: "soplitos_pro", label: "Soplitos Pro ⭐" }, { key: "angelitos", label: "Angelitos 🕊️" }, ]; const applyFilter = (figs) => { if (filtro === "tengo") return figs.filter(f => owned.has(f.id)); if (filtro === "me-faltan") return figs.filter(f => !owned.has(f.id)); return figs; }; const adoptFigs = FIGURITAS_DATA.filter(f => f.estado === "En adopción" && owned.has(f.id)); const filterBtns = [ { key: "todas", label: "Todas", count: total }, { key: "tengo", label: "Las tengo", count: owned.size }, { key: "me-faltan", label: "Me faltan", count: total - owned.size }, ]; return (

{cat.label}
{figs.map(f => { const isOwned = owned.has(f.id); const ec = estadoClass(f.estado); const foto = FOTOS[f.id]; return (
#{f.id} {foto ? (

); })} {filtro === "todas" && adoptFigs.length > 0 && (
¿Querés adoptar? Si querés que alguno de estos soplitos sea parte de tu familia, escribinos por Instagram 🐾
)}
); } // ── TIENDA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // ── PACK OPENING MODAL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function PackOpenModal({ pack, onClose }) { const [phase, setPhase] = useState("intro"); // intro | opening | reveal | done const [revealed, setRevealed] = useState([]); const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0); const [flipped, setFlipped] = useState([]); // Generate random figuritas when modal opens const [drawn] = useState(() => { const shuffled = [...FIGURITAS_DATA].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5); return shuffled.slice(0, pack.cantidad); }); const catBg = (cat) => { if (cat === "soplitos_pro") return "linear-gradient(160deg,#FFFBE6,#FFF3B0)"; if (cat === "angelitos") return "linear-gradient(160deg,#F0F3F8,#E2E8F4)"; return "linear-gradient(160deg,#F3EEFF,#E8DFFA)"; }; const catBorder = (cat) => { if (cat === "soplitos_pro") return "#F5C842"; if (cat === "angelitos") return "#C0C8D8"; return "#C9B8E8"; }; const catLabel = (cat) => { if (cat === "soplitos_pro") return "⭐ Soplito Pro"; if (cat === "angelitos") return "🕊️ Angelito"; return "🐾 Soplito"; }; const estClass = estadoClass; const startOpening = () => { setPhase("opening"); setTimeout(() => { setPhase("reveal"); setRevealed([]); setCurrent(0); }, 1400); }; const flipNext = () => { if (flipped.includes(current)) return; setFlipped(prev => [...prev, current]); setTimeout(() => { if (current < drawn.length - 1) setCurrent(prev => prev + 1); else setPhase("done"); }, 600); }; const revealAll = () => { setFlipped(drawn.map((_, i) => i)); setPhase("done"); }; const modalStyle = { position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:200,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center", background:"rgba(61,43,90,0.7)",backdropFilter:"blur(6px)",padding:16 }; const boxStyle = { background:"linear-gradient(160deg,#F3EEFF,#EBF6FD)",borderRadius:24,padding:24, width:"100%",maxWidth:420,maxHeight:"90vh",overflowY:"auto", boxShadow:"0 20px 60px rgba(61,43,90,0.3)",position:"relative" }; return (
e.target === e.currentTarget && onClose()}>

Tienda

Cada compra va 100% al refugio 🐾

💜 Tu compra ayuda de verdad

El 100% de cada pago va directamente a la cuenta del refugio Soplo de Vida para comprar alimento, medicación, cubrir gastos veterinarios y más.

🎁 Elegí tu pack
{Object.entries(PACK_SIZES).map(([k, p]) => (
🎁
Pack x{p.cantidad}
${p.precio}
Comprar real →
))}

La simulación es solo para ver cómo funcionan los packs. Para coleccionar de verdad, ¡comprá el pack real!

💙 Donaciones

Toda ayuda sirve. Podés donar el monto que quieras:{" "} Donar ahora 🐾

También nos ayuda mucho si querés hacer donaciones en especie. Escribinos a nuestro Instagram para coordinar, necesitamos:

  • Alimento de perro y de gato (adulto y cachorro)
  • Pipetas y antiparasitarios
  • Medicación veterinaria
  • Mantas, toallas, camitas
  • Piedritas sanitarias para gato
  • Leche maternizada (consultarnos marcas)
  • Insumos farmacéuticos: vendas, alcohol, gasas, etc.
📲 Instagram Soplo de Vida
{openPack && setOpenPack(null)} />}
); } // ── CAMBIOS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function CambiosSection({ userData, allUsers, onUpdate, showToast }) { const owned = new Set(userData?.album || []); const [ofrezco, setOfrezco] = useState(""); const [busco, setBusco] = useState(""); const allCambios = allUsers.filter(u => u.username !== userData.username).flatMap(u => (u.cambios || []).map(c => ({ ...c, fromUser: u.username }))); const figById = id => FIGURITAS_DATA.find(f => f.id === id); const handlePublish = () => { if (!ofrezco || !busco) return; const nc = { id: Date.now(), ofrezco: parseInt(ofrezco), busco: parseInt(busco) }; onUpdate({ ...userData, cambios: [...(userData.cambios || []), nc] }); setOfrezco(""); setBusco(""); showToast("¡Cambio publicado! 🔄"); }; const opO = FIGURITAS_DATA.filter(f => owned.has(f.id)); const opB = FIGURITAS_DATA.filter(f => !owned.has(f.id)); return (

); } // ── RANKING ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function RankingSection({ allUsers }) { const sorted = [...allUsers].map(u => ({ username: u.username, owned: (u.album||[]).length, pct: getPct((u.album||[]).length, FIGURITAS_DATA.length) })).sort((a,b) => b.pct - a.pct); const medals = ["🥇","🥈","🥉"]; const pclass = ["gold","silver","bronze"]; return (

); } // ── APP ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── export default function App() { const [users, setUsers] = useState({}); const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState(null); const [tab, setTab] = useState("album"); const [toast, setToast] = useState(""); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { try { const r = localStorage.getItem("sdv_users"); if(r) setUsers(JSON.parse(r)); } catch {} try { const r = localStorage.getItem("sdv_session"); if(r) setCurrentUser(r); } catch {} setLoading(false); }, []); const saveUsers = (nu) => { setUsers(nu); localStorage.setItem("sdv_users", JSON.stringify(nu)); }; const showToast = msg => { setToast(msg); setTimeout(() => setToast(""), 3000); }; const handleLogin = (username, nu) => { setUsers(nu); setCurrentUser(username); }; const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem("sdv_session"); setCurrentUser(null); }; const updateUserData = (nd) => { const nu = { ...users, [nd.username]: nd }; saveUsers(nu); }; if (loading) return ( <>

); if (!currentUser) return ; const userData = users[currentUser] || { username: currentUser, album: [], cambios: [] }; const allUsersArr = Object.values(users); const navItems = [ { key:"album", icon:"📖", label:"Mi Álbum" }, { key:"tienda", icon:"🛍️", label:"Tienda" }, { key:"cambios", icon:"🔄", label:"Cambios" }, { key:"ranking", icon:"🏆", label:"Ranking" }, { key:"comunidad", icon:"💜", label:"Comunidad" }, ]; return ( <>
